sections.title: Initial Release
changes: 19 complete content sections covering all core survival domains
9 interactive tools: calorie calculator, water budget, solar sizing, supply tracker, skill inventory, planting calendar, bug-out decision tree, radio frequencies, medication reference
ARIA AI assistant via Ollama — fully offline capable
60-book reference library with free PDF links and acquisition tracker
Complete gear checklist with localStorage persistence
Service worker for full offline caching
High contrast and night vision display modes
Font size accessibility controls (Normal / Large / XL)
Inline SVG diagrams throughout — no external images required
Zero CDN dependencies — works from USB drive on any browser
